content.question: What phase-in timeline and transition-support structures would minimize double-cohort disruption and teacher displacement if grade-span or catchment consolidation were implemented, versus the acute disruption observed in Poland's 2017 reversal?
content.reduction_path: Map teacher age/contract distribution across small school staff; design phased implementation allowing natural attrition or retraining pathways; pilot with one regional consolidation cluster and measure both student-placement success and teacher employment outcomes relative to Poland's 2017 baseline
